boundary_binding.action_boundary: May logistics release the controlled export shipment?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: All five required fields exactly match: ECCN 3A991, destination Chile, end user Andes Labs, shipment date 2026-06-28, and license effective date satisfied before export per LIC-SIE-073 and confirmed by SHIP-SIE-073.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: LIC-SIE-073 is the controlling export license; WARN-SIE-073 is a general family warning that cannot serve as execution authority per Gov blocked moves.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: N/A - no source-record defects remain open.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: STD-SIE-073-P requires exact match of five fields; LIC-SIE-073 provides all five; SHIP-SIE-073 confirms all five match. WARN-SIE-073 is advisory only and does not override the exact license evidence.

critical_features_preserved: destination Chile and end user Andes Labs explicitly stated
final_answer: Logistics may release the controlled export shipment. Export license LIC-SIE-073 exactly matches shipment SHIP-SIE-073 across all five required fields: ECCN 3A991, destination Chile, end user Andes Labs, and shipment date 2026-06-28, with license effective before export. Policy STD-SIE-073-P is satisfied. General warning WARN-SIE-073 does not block execution as it cannot override the exact license match per governing blocked-move rules.
